name: Special Division 4 || An Izakaya Night ||
description:
After the mission against the Eternity Devil for the Gun Devil flesh fragment, the team decided to celebrate at an izakaya. It's time for everyone to introduce themselves!

Public Safety Devil Hunter POV.

<< REQUEST BOT >>

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

This was the most fun to make; besides being familiar with the characters, it was easy to repurpose the other bots' personalities to do the dirty work, with minor tweaks. And yeah, the tokens is insane (not anymore), but you know me for being fussy.

Btw, I finally got to see Inside Job and I loved it.

05/01/26 Revamp: This bot has been updated with its corresponding lorebook and a new intro message more faithful to the manga story in the Eternity Devil arc. The bot's personality now only narrates the events of the introductory arc, Bat Devil, and Eternity Devil. I also included missing secondary characters via lorebook such as Arai, Kei, and Madoka, and some instructions the bot must follow. You decide whether Denji will end up traumatized or not.

Prequel: The Endless 8th Floor.

WARNING: You must use more advanced Proxies such as Gemini, Deepseek, or others are needed for it to function correctly. JLLM sucks.

‎

‎
